title: UIAO Reciprocity-Record Schema (Phase 0 stub)
description: JSON Schema for a per-consuming-agency reciprocity record under the UIAO Single-ATO Reciprocity Model (UIAO_140 §6). Established by ADR-058. Phase 0 stub — required-field set is intentionally minimal until Batch A WS-A1 fills it. Final shape MUST conform to UIAO_140 §6 lines 102-121 and the legal_basis enum from src/uiao/schemas/reciprocal-consumption/registry.schema.json (ADR-055 enforcement). This stub exists to (a) reserve the schema $id, (b) pass schema-validation CI as a no-op, and (c) give Batch A WS-A1 a concrete file to extend.

schema-version.description: Semantic version of this record document schema. Phase 0 stub uses 0.1.0; promoted to 1.0.0 when Batch A WS-A1 fills the required-field set.

controlling_ato_id.description: Stable identifier of the controlling ATO under which this reciprocity record is issued. Phase 0 stub: optional. Batch A WS-A1: promoted to required.

consuming_agency_code.description: Three-to-six-letter agency code of the consuming agency (e.g., TREAS, IRS, SSA). Phase 0 stub: optional. Batch A WS-A1: promoted to required.

$comment: Phase 0 stub authored 2026-05-06. Established under ADR-058. Batch A WS-A1 fills the full required-field set per UIAO_140 §6 (controlling_ato_id, consuming_agency_code, reciprocity_basis, legal_basis enum, effective_at, expires_at, configuration_latitude_ref, signature, provenance). Until then, this schema validates any object that carries a schema-version string.
